title: Korak 7

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def pin_extractor(poem):
    secret_code = ''
    lines = poem.split('\n')
    for line in lines:
        print(line)
        words = line.split()
        print(words)

poem = """Stars and the moon
shine in the sky
white and bright
until the end of the night"""

pin_extractor(poem)
challengeFiles.seed:
def pin_extractor(poem):
    secret_code = ''
    lines = poem.split('\n')
    for line in lines:
        print(line)
        words = line.split()

poem = """Stars and the moon

tests.text: The loop should have line_index, line as loop variable.
You should have print(line_index, line) inside the loop.

description:
Kao što ste naučili u prethodnoj lekciji, funkcija enumerate omogućava vam da pratite indeks dok iterirate preko nečega što je iterabilno:

fruits = ['apple', 'plum', 'bananas']

for index, item in enumerate(fruits):
    print(index, item)

# 0 apple
# 1 plum
# 2 bananas

n-ta cifra tajnog koda dolazi iz n-te reči na n-tom redu, pa morate znati koji je broj svakog reda.

Izmenite petlju tako da iterira na enumerate(lines), i dodajte još jednu promenljivu petlje pre line pod nazivom line_index.

Takođe, ažurirajte poziv print na print(line_index, line).
